series_metadata.series_description: Records that comprise, without limitation, plats, deeds, easements, property lines and boundary agreements, physical and legal descriptions, and field notes of or pertaining to Department owned property.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Permanent. ; Microform: Permanent ; Paper: Permanent. If paper copy is scanned and saved in an electronic format or micro-form, paper copy may be destroyed at that time
retention_rules.disposition_method: Electronic: Permanent ; Microform: Permanent ; Paper: Wastepaper
